name: scaleup
description: Higher-throughput profile: keep behavior fixed, prefer native code for the hot numeric path.

reasons.choose_fulfillment_store: bundle target keeps selection implementation and judge adapter explicit under the scale profile
reasons.choose_substitution_pack: bundle target keeps substitution policy isolated from host app glue
reasons.compute_promise_minutes: profile marks promise timing as a hot numeric path, so the compiler emits ARM64 assembly
